app.description: TanStack Start web app that delivers lessons, biography stories, and quizzes to a single young learner.

routes.description: File-based route pages: root document, app shell, overview, lesson viewer, story reader, and login workflows.

components.description: Shared interactive UI: catalog sidebar and the quiz drawer reused by both lesson and story flows.

lib.description: Server functions and domain logic: Postgres access, session auth, curriculum outline, and lesson/story/quiz delivery and grading.

course-authoring.description: Course-generation guides, official curriculum anchors, and stage ledgers that govern lesson content authoring.

db-schema.description: Authoritative Postgres schema (SSOT) defining users, lessons, quizzes, stories, and answer-event tables.
